schema_diagram.description: Entity-Relationship diagram showing database schema and relationships
schema_diagram.content:
erDiagram
    SETS ||--o{ SET_TRANSLATIONS : "has"
    CARDS ||--o{ LEGALITIES : "has"
    CARDS ||--o{ RULINGS : "has"
    CARDS ||--o{ FOREIGN_DATA : "has"

    RULINGS {
        int id PK
        datetime date
        text text
        text uuid FK
    }
    FOREIGN_DATA {
        int id PK
        text flavorText
        text language
        int multiverseid
        text name
        text text
        text type
        text uuid FK
    }
    SET_TRANSLATIONS {
        int id PK
        text language
        text setCode FK
        text translation
    }
    SETS {
        int id PK
        int baseSetSize
        text block
        text booster
        text code
        int isFoilOnly
        int isForeignOnly
        int isNonFoilOnly
        int isOnlineOnly
        int isPartialPreview
        text keyruneCode
        int mcmId
        int mcmIdExtras
        text mcmName
        text mtgoCode
        text name
        text parentCode
        datetime releaseDate
        int tcgplayerGroupId
        int totalSetSize
        text type
    }
    CARDS {
        int id PK
        text artist
        text asciiName
        text availability
        text borderColor
        text cardKingdomFoilId
        text cardKingdomId
        text colorIdentity
        text colorIndicator
        text colors
        float convertedManaCost
        text duelDeck
        int edhrecRank
        float faceConvertedManaCost
        text faceName
        text flavorName
        text flavorText
        text frameEffects
        text frameVersion
        text hand
        int hasAlternativeDeckLimit
        int hasContentWarning
        int hasFoil
        int hasNonFoil
        int isAlternative
        int isFullArt
        int isOnlineOnly
        int isOversized
        int isPromo
        int isReprint
        int isReserved
        int isStarter
        int isStorySpotlight
        int isTextless
        int isTimeshifted
        text keywords
        text layout
        text leadershipSkills
        text life
        text loyalty
        text manaCost
        text mcmId
        text mcmMetaId
        text mtgArenaId
        text mtgjsonV4Id
        text mtgoFoilId
        text mtgoId
        text multiverseId
        text name
        text number
        text originalReleaseDate
        text originalText
        text originalType
        text otherFaceIds
        text power
        text printings
        text promoTypes
        text purchaseUrls
        text rarity
        text scryfallId
        text scryfallIllustrationId
        text scryfallOracleId
        text setCode
        text side
        text subtypes
        text supertypes
        text tcgplayerProductId
        text text
        text toughness
        text type
        text types
        text uuid
        text variations
        text watermark
    }
    LEGALITIES {
        int id PK
        text format
        text status
        text uuid FK
    }

legalities.name: legalities
legalities.description: The legalities table tracks the legality status of cards across various Magic: The Gathering formats, indicating which cards are permitted in each competitive or casual format.

rulings.name: rulings
rulings.description: The rulings table stores official decisions or judgments, likely issued by a regulatory, legal, or administrative body, with each row representing a distinct ruling.

'If a noncreature artifact becomes an artifact creature this way and then another effect animates it, the new effect overrides March of the Machines’s effect. For example, Chimeric Staff is a 4/4 creature while March of the Machines is on the battlefield. '
